title: Reverse Nodes in k-Group
description: Given the head of a linked list, reverse the nodes of the list k at a time, and return the modified list.

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
description: Merge all the linked-lists into one sorted linked-list and return it.

title: Sort List Algorithm
description: Given the head of a linked list, return the list after sorting it in ascending order. Must use O(n log n) time.

title: Binary Watch Combinations
description: Return all possible times the watch could represent given a number of turned-on LEDs.

title: Generate Subsets Basics
description: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets (the power set).

title: Simple Permutations
description: Given a string of unique characters, return all possible permutations.

testCases.expectedOutput: x y z, x z y, y x z, y z x, z x y, z y x

title: Path Sum Backtrack
description: Given a tree representation and a target sum, determine if there's a path.

title: N-th Tribonacci Number
description: The Tribonacci sequence Tn is defined as follows: T0 = 0, T1 = 1, T2 = 1, and Tn+3 = Tn + Tn+1 + Tn+2. Return the value of Tn.

title: Min Cost Climbing Stairs
description: You are given an integer array cost where cost[i] is the cost of ith step on a staircase. Return the minimum cost to reach the top of the floor.

title: Divisor Game
description: Alice and Bob take turns playing a game. Return true if Alice wins, assuming optimal play.

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
description: Given an array of integers heights representing the histogram's bar height where the width of each bar is 1, return the area of the largest rectangle in the histogram.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

title: Basic Calculator Implementation
description: Given a string s representing a valid expression, implement a basic calculator to evaluate it.

title: Maximal Rectangle
description: Given a binary matrix, find the largest rectangle containing only 1's and return its area.

title: Minimum Depth of Tree
description: Given a binary tree, find its minimum depth.

title: Average of Levels
description: Given the root of a binary tree, return the average value of the nodes on each level.

title: Symmetric Tree Level
description: Check if a tree is symmetric around its center.

title: Cousins in Tree
description: Determine if two given nodes in a tree are cousins (same depth, different parents).

title: Find Center of Graph
description: Find the center node of a star graph.

title: Same Tree Check
description: Given the roots of two binary trees, write a function to check if they are the same or not.

title: Max Depth using DFS
description: Find the maximum depth of a binary tree.

title: Path Sum Check
description: Determine if the tree has a root-to-leaf path summing to target.

title: Leaf-Similar Trees
description: Check if two trees have the same leaf value sequence.

title: Find Peak Element Array
description: A peak element is an element that is strictly greater than its neighbors. Find a peak element and return its index.
